prompt: A dramatic hyper-realistic studio image of 2 black leather boxing gloves colliding mid-air in the center of the frame, shown in a tight close-up against a dark navy-to-black background. The right glove enters from the right and is labeled Nano Banana 2 in large bold warm-gold sans-serif letters, with angular gold accent stripes and a stylized gold emblem on the cuff. Cinematic composition, centered clash, symmetrical balance, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, commercial advertising style.
